name: Storm of spring
short_description: Draw the wind with the mouse and let the fluffy jellyfish fly high! If you fall, don't worry, just climb back up. There's also the Easy Mode for those who are afraid of falling!
detailed_description:
Synopsis

Draw the wind and let the fluffy jellyfish fly!

Go to the right place to sprout and put down roots, to a well-sunlit area.

Gameplay

Use only the mouse. Let the wind blow and let the fluffy jellyfish fly high!

This game is a so-called Foddian type "climbing" game. Climb, fall, and climb again.

Two difficulty levels and two endings.

Easy Mode

If you are not good at climbing games, don't worry!

You can retry as many times as you want from a checkpoint.

However, there are some areas and endings that cannot be reached.

Hard Mode

Normal game. Checkpoints are just decorations.

Scenery

Don't get fed up with the ever-changing road, the game changes from day to night.

At night it is dark and hard to see the terrain? If that's the case, you can fix the time in the options.

Video Streaming

For live streaming and video submissions using this game.

Individuals, corporations, with or without revenue are allowed.

If possible, please include the title of the game and a link to the Steam store page.

For bug reports

Please post to the Discussion.
